execution_boundary.summary: Runtime enforcement claims must be sourced before execution-boundary tests can be compared.

preparation_boundary.summary: No sourced preparation-state behavior has been captured.

commitment_boundary.summary: Any runtime result must be routed to StegVerse commitment review before consequence binding.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Tool/action semantic-equivalence handling requires source or test evidence.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown trajectory handling is not yet sourced.

authority_boundary.summary: External runtime output is evidence, not StegVerse authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Source version and runtime configuration must be current for any observation.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Audit traces or receipts are required before reconstruction can be assessed.

interoperability_path.summary: Candidate path is runtime output to Commitment Candidate to SPE review.

next_required_action: identify official CARE Runtime source and create first sourced benchmark fixture
